7 #ifndef ARCGEOSIM_SURFACEUTILS_ISURFACEUTILS_H
8 #define ARCGEOSIM_SURFACEUTILS_ISURFACEUTILS_H
9 
10 #include <arcane/utils/Real3.h>
11 #include <arcane/Item.h>
12 
13 using namespace Arcane;
14 
15 class ISurface;
16 class ISurfacePair;
17 
18 class ISurfaceUtils
19 {
20 public:
22 
23  struct NodeFaceContact
24  {
25  NodeFaceContact() { }
26  NodeFaceContact(const Node & node, const Face & face, const Real3 & pos)
27  : first(node), second(face), position(pos), position_node() { }
28  NodeFaceContact(const Node & node, const Face & face, const Real3 & pos, const Node & node_pos)
29  : first(node), second(face), position(pos), position_node(node_pos) { }
30  Node first;
31  Face second;
32  Real3 position;
33  Node position_node;
34  };
35 
36  typedef SharedArray<NodeFaceContact> NodeFaceContactList;
37 
38  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
39 
40  struct FaceFaceContact {
41  FaceFaceContact() { }
42  FaceFaceContact(const FaceFaceContact & c)
43  : faceA(c.faceA), faceB(c.faceB),
44  centerA(c.centerA), centerB(c.centerB),
45  normalA(c.normalA), normalB(c.normalB) { }
46  FaceFaceContact(const Face & fA, const Face & fB)
47  : faceA(fA), faceB(fB) { }
48  Face faceA, faceB;
49  Real3 centerA, centerB;
50  Real3 normalA, normalB;
51  };
52 
53  typedef SharedArray<FaceFaceContact> FaceFaceContactList;
54 
55  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
56 
57  enum NodeFaceProjection { DirectProjection, ReverseProjection };
58 
59  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
60 
61 public:
63  ISurfaceUtils() {}
64 
66  virtual ~ISurfaceUtils() {} ;
67 
69  virtual void init() = 0 ;
70 
72  virtual ISurface* createSurface(FaceGroup face_group) = 0 ;
73 
75  virtual ISurfacePair* createSurfacePair(ISurface * master, ISurface * slave) = 0 ;
76 
78 
80  virtual void computeSurfaceContact(ISurfacePair* surface_pair,
81  NodeFaceContactList & contact,
82  const NodeFaceProjection direction) = 0;
83 
85 
86  virtual void computeSurfaceContact(ISurfacePair* surface_pair,
87  FaceFaceContactList & contact) = 0;
88 };
89 
90 #endif /* ARCGEOSIM_SURFACEUTILS_ISURFACEUTILS_H */
